title: The Nyaban Brothers Enter the Battle
description: On pages 5–8, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: I really don't feel too active

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: You're also right, that I'm no longer your captain...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: I am only the "client" in this plan!! A client who will kill if the plan fails!!

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: This is the first time I see the Nyaban Brothers get caught...!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: ...even though he does have swords on his hands, the myaban brothers who can take on zero are just like babies in his hands....!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What are you still hoping for...?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Even if he faces so assumes, he can still kill them all silently...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: We can't escape from his plans

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Plus... when I met up with him, he sent a shiver down my spine when I saw that he still kept that "habit"

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: In order to avoid scratching himself with his "Cat's claws"...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: He picked up that habit of pushing his glasses up...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: this proves that he hasn't for- gotten how to fight....!!

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
